2352810.name: Diggy Diggy Dwarf
2352810.description:
Diggy Diggy Dwarf, or also known as "Dig, Dwarf Dig!!!" a roguelite 2D platform game where we must dig to get a wealth, improve our weapons and armor and survive the hordes of monsters that lurk beneath the mountain in which we work mining, hunt treasures and of course... show the dwarf superiority over the other species. Everything else is pure excuse.


Start as the "baby face" and increase your power by showing what you are capable of, and become the insignia of an entire server, defeating from goblins to the most wicked enemies the dwarves have ever seen.


Dig, build, collect, register, and forge weapons to improve your chances, each round consists of twenty minutes in which you must survive or in the worst case, you must escape before the last waves, leaving the mine, your home... yes... but surviving for a new encounter, for a new adventure in the mines. Such is the life of the dwarf when digging deep, such is life in this online cooperative survival. Where you can be the server and change practically all the rules of the game to your liking and whim.

Easily editable files, the creation logic more simplified than ever, to give free rein to your follies, ideas, and of course share them with all those who want to be a part, forge and create new adventures for others to live, and be part of your dream.


Interested in the project? Come and chat with me at
2352810.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
